name: Honiara (Solomon Islands)

colors.symbolism: the disc of the city seal

description: A white field bearing the circular seal of the City of Honiara: a green disc crossed by a yellow band and charged with a white star, within a ring inscribed 'CITY OF HONIARA - NATIONAL CAPITAL'.
history: Honiara, on the island of Guadalcanal, is the capital and largest city of the Solomon Islands and forms the country's national capital territory. Its flag is the municipal seal on a white field.

features.role: seal of the City of Honiara - a white star on a green disc with a yellow band
